subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Jawhar-i-Hamd II
subcodes.first_line: The essence of praise and its purest expression befitteth that Sovereign, before Whom the monarchs of the world glory in their servitude [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جوهر حمد و ساذج آن مالکی را لایق و سزاست که ملوک عالم بمملوکیتش فخر نموده و
subcodes.subjects: @collection; ordering of the Sacred Writings, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @praise and encouragement, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @justice and wrath of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
